creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The repository is probably just private since https://github.com/oSumAtrIX/DownOnSpot/issues/38 and https://github.com/oSumAtrIX/DownOnSpot#building mention a private ssh key to access it. It seems pretty sketchy…

But this cannot be supported in the framework now since it doesn't have native Git support and we have to rely on GitHub's archive service. I don't see how USES=cargo could support something like this without that being solved first.
